name: lemons-crowd
summary: Python wrapper for the LEMONS library to generate anthropometry-based, non-circular pedestrian shapes, visualize crowds, and simulate 2D dynamics.
author_email: Oscar DUFOUR <oscar.dufour@univ-lyon1.fr>, Maxime STAPELLE <maxime.stapelle@univ-lyon1.fr>, Alexandre NICOLAS <alexandre.nicolas@univ-lyon1.fr>
